title: BEM-843 route protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 20:12 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b842=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_protocol_agreement_response.json')
real=b842.get('real_protocol_responses',[]) if isinstance(b842.get('real_protocol_responses',[]),list) else []
queue=b842.get('queue_remaining',[]) if isinstance(b842.get('queue_remaining',[]),list) else []
results=b842.get('dispatch_results',[]) if isinstance(b842.get('dispatch_results',[]),list) else []
if real:
    status='protocol_response_found_protocol_extracted'
    src=real[-1].get('path') if isinstance(real[-1],dict) else str(real[-1])
    body=read(src)
    out=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
    out.write_text('# BEM-840 | AGREED MULTI-AGENT PROTOCOL | GPT + CLAUDE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Источник Claude: '+src+sep+sep+body+sep)
    next_action='send protocol to operator and continue implementation only after operator resumes roadmap'
    created_files=[str(out)]
elif results:
    status='dispatch_result_exists_but_no_protocol_response'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and repair Claude dispatcher/runtime or provider until real protocol response exists'
    created_files=[]
elif queue:
    status='queue_exists_but_no_dispatch_result'
    next_action='repair queue processor/result writer; protocol not agreed yet'
    created_files=[]
else:
    status='protocol_request_not_committed_recreate_queue'
    next_action='recreate protocol request and queue with guaranteed changed file'
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_protocol_agreement_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 retry protocol agreement request because BEM-842 found no queue/result/response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(q)]
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'bem842_status':b842.get('status'),'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_route_protocol_response_or_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_route_protocol_response_or_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Route Protocol Response Or Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_route_protocol_response_or_repair.json','governance/reports/bem843_route_protocol_response_or_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed BEM-842 protocol response: extracted protocol if real Claude answer exists; otherwise selected next repair without faking agreement')
"""
